provider.name: Dmenu
provider.noSessionDesc: Use IPC or noctalia-dmenu script to send items
provider.customInputHint: ✎  Custom input allowed — type anything and press Enter
settings.panelPositionDesc: Where the dmenu panel appears on screen
settings.showMatchCountDesc: Show filtered/total count in footer while searching
settings.showFooterDesc: Show the result count bar below the list
settings.resultFileDesc: Where selections are written for scripts to read
settings.resultFormatDesc: How the selection is written to the result file
settings.allowCustomDesc: Let users type and submit text that isn't in the item list
settings.customPrefixDesc: Prefix added to custom input values
settings.closeOnSelectDesc: Automatically close the launcher when an item is selected
settings.showToastDesc: Display a notification when an item is selected
settings.maxResultsDesc: Maximum number of items to display: {count}
